prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny feature workflow, then complete it end to end without waiting for more user input. Add a subtract helper to the calculator fixture, cover it with tests, update the fixture README with a short subtract example, and finish with verification plus review status. Choose the minimum required subagent set yourself; do not ask me which required agent to use. Keep at least one specialist handoff visibly structured in the transcript using that agent's standard role heading, for example `Task: Design`, `Task: Explore`, `Task: Code Review`, `Task: Testing`, or a matching `## Code Review` style heading.
success_criteria: A new subtract helper is implemented in the calculator fixture
Tests were added or updated and executed successfully
The fixture README was updated with a subtract example
The workflow completes without asking the user to choose mandatory agents
At least one specialist handoff stays visibly structured in the transcript
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
forbidden_transcript_patterns: would you like me to start with (the )?(explorer|architect|tester|code reviewer)
